policy.external_links_in_comments: avoid; point to profile or DM unless approved

skills.name: linkedin-post-writer
skills.job: Viral-ready post, 10 hook formulas, drafted not posted

skills.name: linkedin-humanizer
skills.job: Strips em-dashes, AI vocab, rule-of-three, fake openers

skills.name: linkedin-hook-lab
skills.job: Ten scored hook variants for a topic, picks the best two

skills.name: linkedin-carousel-writer
skills.job: Turns a post into saveable carousel slides

skills.name: linkedin-content-calendar
skills.job: A week of 5 posts across the 5 revenue lanes

skills.name: linkedin-voice-profiler
skills.job: Reads past posts and DMs, builds voice profile

skills.name: linkedin-comment-engine
skills.job: Authority comments to leave on other people's posts

skills.name: linkedin-repurposer
skills.job: One asset into a full week of content

skills.name: linkedin-story-miner
skills.job: Mines work for anonymized, post-worthy proof

skills.name: linkedin-post-autopsy
skills.job: Why a post over/under-performed, and the one fix

skills.name: linkedin-engager-analytics
skills.job: ICP match rate + top 10 ICP profiles from a post

skills.name: linkedin-warm-list-builder
skills.job: A prioritized warming list from ICP + signals

skills.name: linkedin-signal-stack
skills.job: 5+ signals per target so a message reads like homework

skills.name: linkedin-engage-plan
skills.job: A multi-touch warming sequence per target before any pitch

skills.name: linkedin-comment-warmer
skills.job: Value-add comments on target posts to warm them

skills.name: linkedin-profile-auditor
skills.job: Audits own profile as conversion asset

skills.name: linkedin-icp-definer
skills.job: Defines and locks ICP and disqualifiers

skills.name: linkedin-warm-tracker
skills.job: One row per person, next action and due date

skills.name: linkedin-outreach
skills.job: Finds decision-makers, drafts <200-char notes, sends 20/day

skills.name: linkedin-sell-by-chat
skills.job: The 6-message framework from warm to booked

skills.name: linkedin-connection-note
skills.job: Two <200-char notes, each on a real specific hook

skills.name: linkedin-first-dm
skills.job: Two <150-char first DMs for the moment they accept

skills.name: linkedin-reply-triager
skills.job: Classifies every reply and routes it to next move

skills.name: linkedin-objection-handler
skills.job: Answer-first reframe that advances to a call

skills.name: linkedin-followup-adapter
skills.job: The next message from conversation state, not a timer

skills.name: linkedin-cold-reviver
skills.job: A new-angle value bomb before a going-cold lead dies

skills.name: linkedin-booking-closer
skills.job: Once they say yes, stop selling and book

skills.name: linkedin-onboard
skills.job: Builds whole brief in one pass: ICP + voice + offer + pains

skills.name: linkedin-strategist
skills.job: Virtual Head of LinkedIn: names constraint, sequences skills
